symptoms: Product completely liquid — no freezing at all.
Clicking sound from the compressor bay every few seconds.

tests.error-log: REFRIGERATION FAULT — compressor failed to start, 47 attempts logged.
tests.temp-probe: Barrel at ambient temperature. No refrigeration activity.
tests.continuity-test: Compressor windings read perfectly healthy. Start relay is open-circuit — no contact.

flavour: The compressor was fine. The relay was just an understudy.
authenticityNote: A failed start relay prevents the compressor from energising; the clicking is the controller retrying. Very commonly condemned as compressor failure — meter the relay first, it's a $25 fix versus a $900 one.
